title: Tasty Crunchy Brazilian Kielbasa Skewers
description: Spicy crunchy Brazilian dish featuring kielbasa, this quick-fix recipe is perfect for a snack or dinner, and is Jain-friendly as it does not include any animal by-products except kielbasa which can be replaced with a Jain alternative.

ingredients.name: Kielbasa
ingredients.notes: can be replaced with a Jain alternative

instructions: Cut the kielbasa into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and Brazilian pepper flakes.
Add the kielbasa pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the kielbasa marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Preheat a pressure cooker to the saute setting.
Remove the kielbasa from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the kielbasa to the pressure cooker and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add 1/4 cup of water to the pressure cooker and close the lid.
Cook the kielbasa in the pressure cooker for 10 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the cooked kielbasa onto skewers and serve hot.
